Bundled font notices
=====================

Every font under resources/fonts is licensed under the SIL Open Font License,
Version 1.1. The full OFL-1.1 text is in LICENSES/OFL-1.1.txt; this file records the
copyright line and Reserved Font Name (RFN) for each bundled family, as required
by the OFL. All families are shipped unmodified under their original names, so
the OFL's Reserved-Font-Name restriction (which only limits MODIFIED versions)
is not engaged.

Ship this file together with OFL-1.1.txt in every binary package.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Comfortaa
  Copyright 2011 The Comfortaa Project Authors
  (https://github.com/alexeiva/comfortaa),
  with Reserved Font Name "Comfortaa".
  Files: resources/fonts/Comfortaa-*.ttf

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DM Sans
  Copyright 2014 The DM Sans Project Authors
  (https://github.com/googlefonts/dm-fonts)
  No Reserved Font Name.
  Files: resources/fonts/DMSans_18pt-*.ttf

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IBM Plex Sans Condensed
  Copyright 2019 IBM Corp. (https://github.com/IBM/plex)
  with Reserved Font Name "IBM Plex".
  Files: resources/fonts/IBMPlexSans_Condensed-*.ttf

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Instrument Serif
  Copyright 2022 The Instrument Serif Project Authors
  (https://github.com/Instrument/instrument-serif)
  No Reserved Font Name.
  Files: resources/fonts/InstrumentSerif-*.ttf

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
JetBrains Mono
  Copyright 2020 The JetBrains Mono Project Authors
  (https://github.com/JetBrains/JetBrainsMono)
  No Reserved Font Name.
  Files: resources/fonts/JetBrainsMono-*.ttf

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Manrope
  Copyright 2019 The Manrope Project Authors
  (https://github.com/sharanda/manrope)
  No Reserved Font Name.
  Files: resources/fonts/Manrope-*.ttf

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The copyright and licence notices above are also embedded in each .ttf file's
`name` table (name IDs 0 and 13). They were transcribed from those tables; if a
font is ever updated, re-read the embedded notice and update this file to match.
